{{Infobox starship
| name = The Eternal
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[The Eternal Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Eternal is the vessel commanded by [[Cheska Bennett]], who serves as the [[Guild Head]] of the [[Navigators]]. The ship is an [[Awakened]] vessel, characterized by a seamless deck constructed from a single piece of fused wood that features a burnt reddish-orange hue. Its aesthetic is defined by bright red sails and alchemical paint that glows in a matching shade, giving the ship an appearance reminiscent of fresh blood. A notable feature of its movement is that it appears to drift upon a tide of flame, trailing fire across the water's surface when traveling at high speeds. Despite its striking and spectacular appearance, the ship suffered a catastrophic event where it was torn in half by an explosion, leaving its wreckage to be recovered and secured to another vessel by the [[Lyathatan]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Eternal is an approaching [[Awakened]] ship characterized by its blazing red sails and a wake of fire. This vessel features a main room and was observed waiting a day's trip away from the [[Gray Island]]. During its travels, a single Guard was noted to remain within the ship while paddling.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Eternal]] is a ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Eternal]] is a ship with blazing red sails that sails on a wake of fire.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Eternal]] is an approaching entity.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Eternal]] is an [[Awakened]] ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Eternal]] is a location or vessel that a single Guard remains in while paddling.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Eternal]] was waiting a day's trip out from the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Eternal]] is a ship with a main room.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Eternal]] drifts on a tide of flame rather than water.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Eternal is a vessel that previously served as the site for a meeting between [[Guild Heads]]. Although it is a seaworthy ship, it was once ripped to shreds and would sink if dropped by the [[Lyathatan]]. Currently located to the port of [[Calder]]'s position, the ship is approaching the current location and is expected to return to the water.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Eternal]] is a ship that is approaching the current location.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Eternal]] is a ship that would sink if dropped by the [[Lyathatan]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Eternal]] was ripped to shreds.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Eternal]] is a ship where a meeting of [[Guild Heads]] had previously occurred.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Eternal]] is a vessel that can be seaworthy.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Eternal]] is expected to return to the water.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Eternal]] is a ship located to the port of [[Calder]]'s position.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Eternal]] is a rust-colored ship with bright red sails and golden lettering.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Eternal]] is a ship that burns water.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Eternal]] is [[Cheska]]'s ship.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Cheska Bennett. Member of the proud Guild of Navigators, and recently made captain of The Eternal.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
